stimulus: The process of mechanically recycling textiles is often considered ______blank because of the high energy use and the steep drop in fiber quality that often occurs. But chemist Sonja Salmon has helped develop a cleaner enzyme-based process that converts blended cotton-polyester fabric into reusable cotton sugars and intact polyester fibers.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale: Choice C is the best answer because the text describes drawbacks (high energy use and a steep drop in fiber quality), and "inadequate" means not good enough. This fits the negative view of mechanical recycling that the text is setting up before introducing a better alternative. Choices A, B, and D describe positive qualities that would not justify calling for a cleaner alternative.
